items.title_en: Weight loss drug maker sinks 25% after new safety data spooks investors
items.title_zh: 新的安全数据吓坏了投资者，减肥药制造商股价下跌 25%
items.desc_en: While the experimental drug met its key targets, analysts are concerned over the commercial opportunity due to side effects.
items.desc_zh: 虽然实验药物达到了其关键目标，但分析师对副作用带来的商业机会感到担忧。

items.title_en: Nasdaq futures gain 1% as chip stocks rebound from rout, Trump tries to maintain ceasefire: Live updates
items.title_zh: 芯片股从溃败中反弹，纳斯达克期货上涨 1%，特朗普试图维持停火：实时更新
items.desc_en: Investors will also be focused on inflation data and the public debut of SpaceX on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 投资者还将关注通胀数据和周五 SpaceX 的公开亮相。

items.title_en: Marvell Technology jumps almost 9% in premarket after news it will join the S&P 500 index
items.title_zh: Marvell Technology 将加入标准普尔 500 指数的消息传出后，盘前股价上涨近 9%
items.desc_en: Marvell rose in premarket trading after S&P Global said the AI chipmaker would join the S&P 500 on June 22.
items.desc_zh: S&P Global 表示 AI 芯片制造商 Marvell 将于 6 月 22 日加入 S&P 500 指数，该股在盘前交易中上涨。

items.title_en: USAA to return nearly $1 billion to Florida members as legal reforms help lower insurance costs
items.title_zh: 由于法律改革有助于降低保险成本，USAA 将向佛罗里达会员返还近 10 亿美元
items.desc_en: USAA said it will deliver nearly $1 billion in combined savings and returns to eligible Florida members, including a $500 million dividend, CNBC can exclusively report.
items.desc_zh: 据 CNBC 独家报道，USAA 表示，将向符合条件的佛罗里达州会员提供近 10 亿美元的综合储蓄和回报，其中包括 5 亿美元的股息。

items.title_en: Trump insists negotiations are continuing despite Israel and Iran trading strikes
items.title_zh: 特朗普坚称尽管以色列和伊朗进行了贸易打击，谈判仍在继续
items.desc_en: Iran and Israel striking each other threatens the fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran has been in place since early April.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗和以色列的相互攻击威胁到了自四月初以来美国和伊朗之间脆弱的停火。

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Airline profits set to halve this year as fuel costs jump by $100 billion: IATA
items.title_zh: 国际航协：燃油成本上涨1000亿美元，今年航空公司利润将减半
items.desc_en: "The big unknown is how long travelers and shippers can tolerate the higher costs," IATA's Willie Walsh said.
items.desc_zh: 国际航空运输协会的威利·沃尔什表示：“最大的未知数是旅客和托运人能够忍受更高的成本多久。”

items.title_en: Bank of America hikes Sandisk price target to $2,100. Here's why
items.title_zh: 美国银行将 Sandisk 目标价上调至 2,100 美元。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: The bank thinks the memory giant has more room to run thanks to agreements with customers and lingering shortages due to the AI buildout.
items.desc_zh: 该银行认为，由于与客户达成的协议以及人工智能建设造成的长期短缺，这家内存巨头还有更大的运营空间。

items.desc_en: The group includes many women and children who were abducted in March from an area close to Cameroon.

items.title_en: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
items.title_zh: 女性往往比男性长寿。他们应该如何满足长期护理需求
items.desc_en: In addition to typically living longer than their husbands, women also are more likely to need long-term care, which can be costly.
items.desc_zh: 除了通常比丈夫活得更长之外，女性还更有可能需要长期护理，而这可能会很昂贵。

items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基在伦敦会谈前批评切尔诺贝利无人机袭击是“卑鄙的”

items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Insecurity and instability drive voters in Peru's tight presidential race
items.title_zh: 不安全和不稳定推动选民参加秘鲁紧张的总统竞选
items.desc_en: After eight presidents in 10 years, many voters are looking for stability so the next president can focus on tackling crime and inequality.
items.desc_zh: 十年内当选了八位总统，许多选民都在寻求稳定，以便下一任总统能够专注于解决犯罪和不平等问题。

items.title_en: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
items.title_zh: 特朗普退出的奥巴马时代伊朗核协议内部
items.desc_en: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions, despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing.
items.desc_zh: 尽管特朗普发出谈判正在取得进展的信号，但美国和伊朗尚未达成和平协议或解决伊朗的核野心。

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.title_zh: 马克·扎克伯格在人工智能、就业领域任职时间最长的员工——以及她的老板

items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。
